no_active_wound.description: No active wound is asserted; scaffold/protocol evolution only.

evidence_api_break.description: A public evidence/check key disappeared, changed meaning, or lacks alias/deprecation.

post_seal_residue_leak.description: A repo artifact was written after seal/push instead of volatile external storage.

remote_ci_red.description: Remote CI reported a failing terminal state for a commit subject.

remote_ci_pending.description: Remote CI is pending/unknown for current head; do not claim green closure.

stale_readme_surface.description: README/operator docs no longer describe latest state or required next action.

alignment_guard_contract_drift.description: Alignment guard expects stale legacy evidence contract.

workflow_slice_failure.description: One CI slice failed while local proof may still pass.

compact_summary_boundary_leak.description: Compact summary was written to repo after commit instead of sealed-before-commit or volatile external.

render_hygiene_drift.description: Generated text surface contains literal escaped newline drift or broken physical formatting.

render_hygiene_auditor_overmatch.description: Render hygiene gate treats documentation examples as generated-surface drift.

doctor_bootstrap_dirty_self_observation.description: Doctor blocks its own authorized construction because bounded operation dirt is visible.

ci_claim_subject_ambiguity.description: CI claim lacks an explicit commit/run subject.

evidence_replay_incomplete.description: Operation cannot be reconstructed from pointer, evidence, summaries, and dashboard.

unknown_residue.description: Dirty path is not recognized as bounded operation residue.

current_script_gate_mismatch.description: Evidence script identity does not match the active All-One script.

secret_scan_trigger.description: Staged diff contains a secret-like token trigger.

non_claim_lock: Wound taxonomy classifies failures only. It does not execute repair, rerun CI, mutate workflows, or grant authority.
